mcqs.question: Which disk scheduling algorithm may cause starvation?
mcqs.explanation: SSTF always picks closest request. Distant requests may starve if closer ones keep arriving.

mcqs.question: C-SCAN provides more uniform wait times than SCAN because:

options.text: It treats requests equally by not servicing on return

mcqs.explanation: C-SCAN jumps back without servicing, treating all requests equally regardless of their position.
